data.name: DM0101
data.value: MCP tool does not support collection return type

data.name: DM0101_Message
data.value: Method '{0}' returns '{1}', which is a collection type not supported by the MCP protocol. Use a wrapper object or return CallToolResult directly.

data.name: DM0101_Description
data.value: The MCP protocol specification requires Tool's outputSchema to be of type object and CallToolResult.StructuredContent to be an object (not an array). Wrap the collection in an object, or use CallToolResult to build the content manually.
